idea-plugin.name: StyleBop
idea-plugin.description:
Open the current CSS file or workspace folder in StyleBop — a visual macOS editor for stylesheets.

Right-click any .css file or folder and pick Open in StyleBop. The app launches, opens the project, and lands on the construct your cursor was on — a ruleset opens the Rulesets canvas, a @keyframes rule opens the Animations tab, a custom property opens the Tokens tab, and so on.

Requires macOS and a StyleBop install.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.1

  • Drop the upper-bound IDE version constraint — the plugin now loads cleanly on every IDE 2024.1+.

0.1.0

  • Initial release. Right-click .css files or folders to open them in StyleBop.
  • Cursor line is forwarded so the smart-router can open the matching visual surface.

action.description: Open this CSS file or folder in StyleBop
